message.aromaaffect.passive.tracking_act: Cannot enable Passive Mode while tracking is active. Stop tracking first.
guide.aromaaffect.title: Aroma Affect Guide
guide.aromaaffect.subtitle: Scent-Powered Exploration for Minecraft
config.aromaaffect.title: Aroma Affect Settings
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.intro: Aroma Affect brings the sense of smell into Minecraft. Your journey starts with the Aroma Guide — a compass that points you toward the nearest village where a Nose Smith awaits.
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.aroma_guide_de: Given to you on first join. Points to the nearest village.
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.craft_hint: Lost your guide? Craft a new one:
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.nose_smith_des: Find the Nose Smith inside a village — a villager with an oversized nose. Talk to them, bring the flower they request, and they'll give you their nose as a reward: the Forager's Nose.
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.noses_desc: Equip a Nose in your helmet slot to unlock scent abilities. Progression starts with villages and basic blocks, then flowers, and then full category tracking (including biomes) on higher tiers. Press R to open the Scent Menu.
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.ovr_desc: Connect OVR scent hardware to experience real fragrances as you play. The mod works without hardware too — scents are always indicated visually.
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.ovr_bridge_des: To connect your OVR device, download the OVR Bridge — a companion app that links Minecraft with your scent hardware:
guide.aromaaffect.welcome.bridge_tip: Once the Bridge is installed, check the connection status in Settings → Bridge within the mod's configuration screen.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.overview.title: Overview
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.overview.intro: The Sniffer is the key to the Aroma Affect endgame. Once tamed, it becomes your loyal companion — ride it across dimensions, equip it with a powerful nose, and let it sniff out the rarest materials in the world.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.overview.tip_a: Finding a Sniffer Egg is easier with the Ancient Nose equipped. Its Precise Sniffer ability gives you a 40% chance to find a Sniffer Egg when sniffing Suspicious Sand.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.overview.what_:
• Tame it with Torch Flowers and ride it with a Saddle
• Equip it with the Enhanced Sniffer Nose
• Take it on a Dimensional Tour to collect rare scents
• Once fully equipped, it produces Scent Base — the endgame crafting material
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.overview.scent: Scent Base — the endgame material produced by an equipped Sniffer
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.title: Taming & Riding
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.tame_de: Feed a Sniffer 4 Torch Flowers to tame it. Each flower advances the taming progress — you'll see heart particles when successful.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.torchfl: Torch Flower — feed 4 to tame a Sniffer
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.riding_: Once tamed, equip a Saddle on the Sniffer to ride it. Open the Sniffer's inventory with Shift + Right Click and place the Saddle in the first slot. Then right-click with an empty hand to mount.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.saddle_: Saddle — required in slot 1 for riding
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.invento: The Sniffer has 2 equipment slots accessible via Shift + Right Click:

• Slot 1: Saddle — enables riding
• Slot 2: Sniffer Nose — enhances abilities
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.taming.riding_: Riding controls: standard movement keys. The Sniffer moves at 80% of its normal speed, with reduced strafe and reverse.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.title: Dimensional Tour
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.intro: The Dimensional Tour is the quest to collect all three dimension scents. Take your tamed Sniffer to each dimension — it will sniff the air and produce a unique scent item the first time it visits each realm.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.how_desc: When your Sniffer digs in a new dimension, it has an 85% chance to drop that dimension's scent instead of its usual seeds. Each scent can only be obtained once per Sniffer.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.overworld: Overworld Scent — obtained when the Sniffer digs in the Overworld
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.nether_de: Nether Scent — obtained when the Sniffer digs in the Nether
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.end_desc: End Scent — obtained when the Sniffer digs in the End
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.tip_advan: Collecting all three scents grants the "Sniffer Journey" advancement and triggers a celebration with Totem of Undying particles!
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.tour.craft_hin: Once you have all three scents, you can craft the Enhanced Sniffer Nose — the key to the endgame.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.iron_nose.head: Iron Nose
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.iron_nose.item: A rare collectible nose made of iron
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.iron_nose.desc: The Iron Nose is a unique item obtained from Iron Golems. It serves as the key crafting ingredient for the Enhanced Sniffer Nose.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.iron_nose.how_: Drop a Special Rose near an Iron Golem. The golem will pick it up, give you its nose as an Iron Nose item, and permanently lose its nose.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.iron_nose.rose: Special Rose — purchase from the Nose Smith's shop
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.iron_nose.tip: Each Iron Golem can only give its nose once. Once taken, the golem's nose is gone forever!
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.enhanced.title: Enhanced Sniffer Nose
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.enhanced.desc: The culmination of the Dimensional Tour. Crafted from all three dimension scents and an Iron Nose, this powerful nose transforms your Sniffer into an endgame resource machine.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.enhanced.abili: Scent Base Production — the Sniffer produces Scent Base, the endgame crafting material
Enhanced Sniffing — the Sniffer sniffs more frequently (0.5% chance per tick when idle)
Rare Drops — finds diamonds, emeralds, ores, and other exclusive materials at random
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.enhanced.scent: Scent Base — produced by the Sniffer with this nose equipped
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.enhanced.equip: Open the Sniffer's inventory (Shift + Right Click) and place the Enhanced Sniffer Nose in the second slot (decoration slot). The Sniffer will immediately start using its enhanced abilities.
guide.aromaaffect.sniffer.enhanced.tip_i: The Iron Nose is the center piece of this recipe. You'll need to befriend an Iron Golem first!
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.container.head: Scent Container
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.container.show: The vessel for capturing and storing scents
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.container.desc: The Scent Container is the foundation of the endgame crafting system. Combined with Scent Base and specific ingredients, it becomes one of 16 unique scent capsules that can be used with OVR scent hardware.
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.container.scen: Scent Base — produced by a Sniffer with Enhanced Nose
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.winter.title: Winter Scent
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.winter.desc: Cool mint, ozone, and soft snowstorm
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.barnyard.title: Barnyard Scent
guide.aromaaffect.endgame.barnyard.desc: Warm hay, farm animals, fresh country air

guide.aromaaffect.endgame.citrus.desc: Bright, ripe lemon, orange, and grapefruit

guide.aromaaffect.noses.basic_nose.title: Forager's Nose
guide.aromaaffect.noses.basic_nose.desc: Your first Nose. It helps you find villages and core resources so you can start your journey with the Nose Smith.
guide.aromaaffect.noses.basic_nose.obtai: Complete the Nose Smith's flower quest in any village. This Nose cannot be crafted.
guide.aromaaffect.noses.gold_nose.title: Prospector's Nose
guide.aromaaffect.noses.gold_nose.desc: An upgrade from the Forager's Nose. Detects more valuable ores and unlocks flower tracking.
guide.aromaaffect.noses.diamond_nose.des: A powerful Nose that completes your core tracking toolkit: blocks, flowers, structures, and biomes.
guide.aromaaffect.noses.diamond_nose.det: Plains, Forests, Pale Garden, Deserts, Taigas
guide.aromaaffect.noses.blaze_nose.title: Dimensional Nose
guide.aromaaffect.noses.blaze_nose.desc: A Nose attuned to other dimensions. Capable of detecting the most dangerous structures across all realms.
guide.aromaaffect.noses.netherite_nose.d: An ancient Nose of immense power. Unlocks the Precise Sniffer ability, allowing you to sniff out hidden loot from Suspicious Sand.
guide.aromaaffect.noses.netherite_nose.a: Precise Sniffer — sniff Suspicious Sand for a 40% chance to find a Sniffer Egg
guide.aromaaffect.noses.ultimate_nose.de: The ultimate Nose. Grants omniscient detection — nothing in the world can hide from you. Detects every structure, rare blocks, and even the Wither Rose.

history.aromaaffect.empty.saved: No saved entries yet. Save favorites from History.
history.aromaaffect.retrack.disabled: Equip the right Nose to re-track
